017package org.apache.juneau.http.classic;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020
021import java.net.*;
022import java.time.*;
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.function.*;
025
026import org.apache.http.*;
027import org.apache.http.NameValuePair;
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.http.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Accept;
033import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.AcceptCharset;
034import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.AcceptEncoding;
035import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.AcceptLanguage;
036import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.AcceptRanges;
037import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Age;
038import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Allow;
039import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Authorization;
040import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.CacheControl;
041import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ClientVersion;
042import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Connection;
043import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ContentDisposition;
044import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ContentEncoding;
045import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ContentLanguage;
046import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ContentLength;
047import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ContentLocation;
048import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ContentRange;
049import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ContentType;
050import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Date;
051import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Debug;
052import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ETag;
053import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Expect;
054import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Expires;
055import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Forwarded;
056import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.From;
057import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Host;
058import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.IfMatch;
059import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.IfModifiedSince;
060import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.IfNoneMatch;
061import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.IfRange;
062import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.IfUnmodifiedSince;
063import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.LastModified;
064import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Location;
065import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.MaxForwards;
066import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.NoTrace;
067import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Origin;
068import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Pragma;
069import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ProxyAuthenticate;
070import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ProxyAuthorization;
071import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Range;
072import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Referer;
073import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.RetryAfter;
074import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Server;
075import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.TE;
076import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Thrown;
077import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Trailer;
078import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.TransferEncoding;
079import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Upgrade;
080import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.UserAgent;
081import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Vary;
082import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Via;
083import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Warning;
084import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.WwwAuthenticate;
085import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.part.*;
086import org.apache.juneau.http.header.*;
087import org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.*;
088import org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi.*;
089
090/**
091 * Standard predefined HTTP headers.
092 *
093 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
094 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauRestCommon">juneau-rest-common Basics</a>
095 * </ul>
096 */
097@SuppressWarnings({
098   "java:S3740" // Raw Supplier/Header types used in factory methods where HTTP header value type cannot be statically parameterized
099})
100public class HttpHeaders {
101
102   /**
103    * Prevents instantiation.
104    */
105   private HttpHeaders() {}
106
107   /** Accept header for <c>application/atom+xml</c>. */
108   public static final Accept ACCEPT_APPLICATION_ATOM_XML = Accept.APPLICATION_ATOM_XML;
109   /** Accept header for <c>application/x-www-form-urlencoded</c>. */
110   public static final Accept ACCEPT_APPLICATION_FORM_URLENCODED = Accept.APPLICATION_FORM_URLENCODED;
111   /** Accept header for <c>application/json</c>. */
112   public static final Accept ACCEPT_APPLICATION_JSON = Accept.APPLICATION_JSON;
113   /** Accept header for <c>application/octet-stream</c>. */
114   public static final Accept ACCEPT_APPLICATION_OCTET_STREAM = Accept.APPLICATION_OCTET_STREAM;
115   /** Accept header for <c>application/soap+xml</c>. */
116   public static final Accept ACCEPT_APPLICATION_SOAP_XML = Accept.APPLICATION_SOAP_XML;
117   /** Accept header for <c>application/svg+xml</c>. */
118   public static final Accept ACCEPT_APPLICATION_SVG_XML = Accept.APPLICATION_SVG_XML;
119   /** Accept header for <c>application/xhtml+xml</c>. */
120   public static final Accept ACCEPT_APPLICATION_XHTML_XML = Accept.APPLICATION_XHTML_XML;
121   /** Accept header for <c>application/xml</c>. */
122   public static final Accept ACCEPT_APPLICATION_XML = Accept.APPLICATION_XML;
123   /** Accept header for <c>image/bmp</c>. */
124   public static final Accept ACCEPT_IMAGE_BMP = Accept.IMAGE_BMP;
125   /** Accept header for <c>image/gif</c>. */
126   public static final Accept ACCEPT_IMAGE_GIF = Accept.IMAGE_GIF;
127   /** Accept header for <c>image/jpeg</c>. */
128   public static final Accept ACCEPT_IMAGE_JPEG = Accept.IMAGE_JPEG;
129   /** Accept header for <c>image/png</c>. */
130   public static final Accept ACCEPT_IMAGE_PNG = Accept.IMAGE_PNG;
131   /** Accept header for <c>image/svg+xml</c>. */
132   public static final Accept ACCEPT_IMAGE_SVG = Accept.IMAGE_SVG;
133   /** Accept header for <c>image/tiff</c>. */
134   public static final Accept ACCEPT_IMAGE_TIFF = Accept.IMAGE_TIFF;
135   /** Accept header for <c>image/webp</c>. */
136   public static final Accept ACCEPT_IMAGE_WEBP = Accept.IMAGE_WEBP;
137   /** Accept header for <c>multipart/form-data</c>. */
138   public static final Accept ACCEPT_MULTIPART_FORM_DATA = Accept.MULTIPART_FORM_DATA;
139   /** Accept header for <c>text/html</c>. */
140   public static final Accept ACCEPT_TEXT_HTML = Accept.TEXT_HTML;
141   /** Accept header for <c>text/plain</c>. */
142   public static final Accept ACCEPT_TEXT_PLAIN = Accept.TEXT_PLAIN;
143   /** Accept header for <c>text/xml</c>. */
144   public static final Accept ACCEPT_TEXT_XML = Accept.TEXT_XML;
145   /** Accept header for <c>*&#47;*</c> (all media types). */
146   public static final Accept ACCEPT_WILDCARD = Accept.WILDCARD;
147
148   /** Content-Type for <c>application/atom+xml</c>. */
149   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_APPLICATION_ATOM_XML = ContentType.APPLICATION_ATOM_XML;
150   /** Content-Type for <c>application/x-www-form-urlencoded</c>. */
151   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_APPLICATION_FORM_URLENCODED = ContentType.APPLICATION_FORM_URLENCODED;
152   /** Content-Type for <c>application/json</c>. */
153   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_APPLICATION_JSON = ContentType.APPLICATION_JSON;
154   /** Content-Type for <c>application/octet-stream</c>. */
155   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_APPLICATION_OCTET_STREAM = ContentType.APPLICATION_OCTET_STREAM;
156   /** Content-Type for <c>application/soap+xml</c>. */
157   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_APPLICATION_SOAP_XML = ContentType.APPLICATION_SOAP_XML;
158   /** Content-Type for <c>application/svg+xml</c>. */
159   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_APPLICATION_SVG_XML = ContentType.APPLICATION_SVG_XML;
160   /** Content-Type for <c>application/xhtml+xml</c>. */
161   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_APPLICATION_XHTML_XML = ContentType.APPLICATION_XHTML_XML;
162   /** Content-Type for <c>application/xml</c>. */
163   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_APPLICATION_XML = ContentType.APPLICATION_XML;
164   /** Content-Type for <c>image/bmp</c>. */
165   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_IMAGE_BMP = ContentType.IMAGE_BMP;
166   /** Content-Type for <c>image/gif</c>. */
167   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_IMAGE_GIF = ContentType.IMAGE_GIF;
168   /** Content-Type for <c>image/jpeg</c>. */
169   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_IMAGE_JPEG = ContentType.IMAGE_JPEG;
170   /** Content-Type for <c>image/png</c>. */
171   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_IMAGE_PNG = ContentType.IMAGE_PNG;
172   /** Content-Type for <c>image/svg+xml</c>. */
173   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_IMAGE_SVG = ContentType.IMAGE_SVG;
174   /** Content-Type for <c>image/tiff</c>. */
175   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_IMAGE_TIFF = ContentType.IMAGE_TIFF;
176   /** Content-Type for <c>image/webp</c>. */
177   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_IMAGE_WEBP = ContentType.IMAGE_WEBP;
178   /** Content-Type for <c>multipart/form-data</c>. */
179   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_MULTIPART_FORM_DATA = ContentType.MULTIPART_FORM_DATA;
180   /** Content-Type for <c>text/html</c>. */
181   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_TEXT_HTML = ContentType.TEXT_HTML;
182   /** Content-Type for <c>text/plain</c>. */
183   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_TEXT_PLAIN = ContentType.TEXT_PLAIN;
184   /** Content-Type for <c>text/xml</c>. */
185   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_TEXT_XML = ContentType.TEXT_XML;
186   /** Content-Type for <c>*&#47;*</c> (all media types). */
187   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_WILDCARD = ContentType.WILDCARD;
188
189   /**
190    * Creates a new {@link Accept} header.
191    *
192    * @param value
193    *    The header value.
194    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
195    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
196    */
197   public static final Accept accept(MediaRanges value) {
198      return Accept.of(value);
199   }
200
201   /**
202    * Creates a new {@link Accept} header.
203    *
204    * @param value
205    *    The header value.
206    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
207    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
208    */
209   public static final Accept accept(MediaType value) {
210      return Accept.of(value);
211   }
212
213   /**
214    * Creates a new {@link Accept} header.
215    *
216    * @param value
217    *    The header value.
218    *    <br>Must be parsable by {@link MediaRanges#of(String)}.
219    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
220    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
221    */
222   public static final Accept accept(String value) {
223      return Accept.of(value);
224   }
225
226   /**
227    * Creates a new {@link Accept} header with a delayed value.
228    *
229    * <p>
230    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
231    *
232    * @param value
233    *    The header value.
234    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
235    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
236    */
237   public static final Accept accept(Supplier<MediaRanges> value) {
238      return Accept.of(value);
239   }
240
241   /**
242    * Creates a new {@link AcceptCharset} header.
243    *
244    * @param value
245    *    The header value.
246    *    <br>Must be parsable by {@link StringRanges#of(String)}.
247    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
248    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
249    */
250   public static final AcceptCharset acceptCharset(String value) {
251      return AcceptCharset.of(value);
252   }
253
254   /**
255    * Creates a new {@link AcceptCharset} header.
256    *
257    * @param value
258    *    The header value.
259    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
260    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
261    */
262   public static final AcceptCharset acceptCharset(StringRanges value) {
263      return AcceptCharset.of(value);
264   }
265
266   /**
267    * Creates a new {@link AcceptCharset} header with a delayed value.
268    *
269    * <p>
270    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
271    *
272    * @param value
273    *    The supplier of the header value.
274    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
275    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
276    */
277   public static final AcceptCharset acceptCharset(Supplier<StringRanges> value) {
278      return AcceptCharset.of(value);
279   }
280
281   /**
282    * Creates a new {@link AcceptEncoding} header.
283    *
284    * @param value
285    *    The header value.
286    *    <br>Must be parsable by {@link StringRanges#of(String)}.
287    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
288    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
289    */
290   public static final AcceptEncoding acceptEncoding(String value) {
291      return AcceptEncoding.of(value);
292   }
293
294   /**
295    * Creates a new {@link AcceptEncoding} header.
296    *
297    * @param value
298    *    The header value.
299    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
300    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
301    */
302   public static final AcceptEncoding acceptEncoding(StringRanges value) {
303      return AcceptEncoding.of(value);
304   }
305
306   /**
307    * Creates a new {@link AcceptEncoding} header with a delayed value.
308    *
309    * <p>
310    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
311    *
312    * @param value
313    *    The supplier of the header value.
314    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
315    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
316    */
317   public static final AcceptEncoding acceptEncoding(Supplier<StringRanges> value) {
318      return AcceptEncoding.of(value);
319   }
320
321   /**
322    * Creates a new {@link AcceptLanguage} header.
323    *
324    * @param value
325    *    The header value.
326    *    <br>Must be parsable by {@link StringRanges#of(String)}.
327    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
328    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
329    */
330   public static final AcceptLanguage acceptLanguage(String value) {
331      return AcceptLanguage.of(value);
332   }
333
334   /**
335    * Creates a new {@link AcceptLanguage} header.
336    *
337    * @param value
338    *    The header value.
339    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
340    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
341    */
342   public static final AcceptLanguage acceptLanguage(StringRanges value) {
343      return AcceptLanguage.of(value);
344   }
345
346   /**
347    * Creates a new {@link AcceptLanguage} header with a delayed value.
348    *
349    * <p>
350    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
351    *
352    * @param value
353    *    The supplier of the header value.
354    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
355    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
356    */
357   public static final AcceptLanguage acceptLanguage(Supplier<StringRanges> value) {
358      return AcceptLanguage.of(value);
359   }
360
361   /**
362    * Creates a new {@link AcceptRanges} header.
363    *
364    * @param value
365    *    The header value.
366    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
367    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
368    */
369   public static final AcceptRanges acceptRanges(String value) {
370      return AcceptRanges.of(value);
371   }
372
373   /**
374    * Creates a new {@link AcceptRanges} header with a delayed value.
375    *
376    * <p>
377    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
378    *
379    * @param value
380    *    The supplier of the header value.
381    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
382    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
383    */
384   public static final AcceptRanges acceptRanges(Supplier<String> value) {
385      return AcceptRanges.of(value);
386   }
387
388   /**
389    * Creates a new {@link Age} header.
390    *
391    * @param value
392    *    The header value.
393    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
394    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
395    */
396   public static final Age age(Integer value) {
397      return Age.of(value);
398   }
399
400   /**
401    * Creates a new {@link Age} header.
402    *
403    * @param value
404    *    The header value.
405    *    <br>Must be parsable using {@link Integer#parseInt(String)}.
406    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
407    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
408    */
409   public static final Age age(String value) {
410      return Age.of(value);
411   }
412
413   /**
414    * Creates a new {@link Age} header with a delayed value.
415    *
416    * <p>
417    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
418    *
419    * @param value
420    *    The supplier of the header value.
421    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
422    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
423    */
424   public static final Age age(Supplier<Integer> value) {
425      return Age.of(value);
426   }
427
428   /**
429    * Creates a new {@link Allow} header.
430    *
431    * @param value
432    *    The header value.
433    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
434    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
435    */
436   public static final Allow allow(String value) {
437      return Allow.of(value);
438   }
439
440   /**
441    * Creates a new {@link Allow} header.
442    *
443    * @param value
444    *    The header value.
445    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
446    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
447    */
448   public static final Allow allow(String...value) {
449      return Allow.of(value);
450   }
451
452   /**
453    * Creates a new {@link Allow} header with a delayed value.
454    *
455    * <p>
456    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
457    *
458    * @param value
459    *    The supplier of the header value.
460    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
461    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
462    */
463   public static final Allow allow(Supplier<String[]> value) {
464      return Allow.of(value);
465   }
466
467   /**
468    * Creates a new {@link Authorization} header.
469    *
470    * @param value
471    *    The header value.
472    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
473    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
474    */
475   public static final Authorization authorization(String value) {
476      return Authorization.of(value);
477   }
478
479   /**
480    * Creates a new {@link Authorization} header with a delayed value.
481    *
482    * <p>
483    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
484    *
485    * @param value
486    *    The supplier of the header value.
487    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
488    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
489    */
490   public static final Authorization authorization(Supplier<String> value) {
491      return Authorization.of(value);
492   }
493
494   /**
495    * Creates a new {@link BasicHeader} header.
496    *
497    * @param name The parameter name.
498    * @param value
499    *    The parameter value.
500    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
501    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
502    */
503   public static final BasicHeader basicHeader(String name, Object value) {
504      return BasicHeader.of(name, value);
505   }
506
507   /**
508    * Creates a new {@link BasicHeader} header with a delayed value.
509    *
510    * <p>
511    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
512    *
513    * @param name The header name.
514    * @param value
515    *    The supplier of the header value.
516    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
517    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
518    * */
519   public static final BasicHeader basicHeader(String name, Supplier<?> value) {
520      return new BasicHeader(name, value);
521   }
522
523   /**
524    * Creates a new {@link BasicBooleanHeader} header.
525    *
526    * @param name The header name.
527    * @param value
528    *    The header value.
529    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
530    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
531    */
532   public static final BasicBooleanHeader booleanHeader(String name, Boolean value) {
533      return BasicBooleanHeader.of(name, value);
534   }
535
536   /**
537    * Creates a new {@link BasicBooleanHeader} header.
538    *
539    * @param name The header name.
540    * @param value
541    *    The header value.
542    *    <br>Must be parsable by {@link Boolean#parseBoolean(String)}.
543    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
544    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
545    */
546   public static final BasicBooleanHeader booleanHeader(String name, String value) {
547      return BasicBooleanHeader.of(name, value);
548   }
549
550   /**
551    * Creates a new {@link BasicBooleanHeader} header with a delayed value.
552    *
553    * <p>
554    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
555    *
556    * @param name The header name.
557    * @param value
558    *    The supplier of the header value.
559    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
560    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
561    */
562   public static final BasicBooleanHeader booleanHeader(String name, Supplier<Boolean> value) {
563      return BasicBooleanHeader.of(name, value);
564   }

589   public static final CacheControl cacheControl(Supplier<String> value) {

591   }
592
593   /**
594    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if the {@link #cast(Object)} method can be used on the specified object.
595    *
596    * @param o The object to check.
597    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the {@link #cast(Object)} method can be used on the specified object.
598    */
599   public static boolean canCast(Object o) {
600      if (o == null)
601         return false;
602      var ci = ClassInfo.of(o);
603      return nn(ci) && ci.isAssignableToAny(Header.class, Headerable.class, NameValuePair.class, NameValuePairable.class, Map.Entry.class);
604   }
605
606   /**
607    * Utility method for converting an arbitrary object to a {@link Header}.
608    *
609    * @param o
610    *    The object to cast or convert to a {@link Header}.
611    * @return Either the same object cast as a {@link Header} or converted to a {@link Header}.
612   */
613   @SuppressWarnings({
614      "java:S2681" // Each if-branch has a single return; indentation mismatch is cosmetic, not a logic error
615   })
616   public static Header cast(Object o) {
617      if (o instanceof Header o2)
618         return o2;
619      if (o instanceof Headerable o3)
620         return o3.asHeader();
621      if (o instanceof NameValuePair o4)
622         return BasicHeader.of(o4);
623      if (o instanceof NameValuePairable o5)
624         return BasicHeader.of(o5.asNameValuePair());
625      if (o instanceof Map.Entry e) {
626         return BasicHeader.of(s(e.getKey()), s(e.getValue()));
627      }
628      throw rex("Object of type {0} could not be converted to a Header.", cn(o));
629   }
630

744    *

746    * @return A non-<jk>null</jk> header.
747    * @throws IllegalArgumentException If {@code filename} is invalid.
748    */
749   public static final ContentDisposition contentDispositionAttachment(String filename) {
750      return ContentDisposition.attachment(filename);

1189   /**
1190    * Creates a new {@link BasicEntityTagsHeader} header.
1191    *
1192    * @param name The header name.
1193    * @param value
1194    *    The header value.
1195    *    <br>Must be a comma-delimited list of entity validator values (e.g. <js>"\"xyzzy\", \"r2d2xxxx\", \"c3piozzzz\""</js>).
1196    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1197    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1198    */
1199   public static final BasicEntityTagsHeader entityTagsHeader(String name, String value) {
1200      return BasicEntityTagsHeader.of(name, value);
1201   }
1202
1203   /**
1204    * Creates a new {@link BasicEntityTagsHeader} header with a delayed value.
1205    *
1206    * <p>
1207    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
1208    *
1209    * @param name The header name.
1210    * @param value
1211    *    The supplier of the header value.
1212    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1213    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1214    */
1215   public static final BasicEntityTagsHeader entityTagsHeader(String name, Supplier<EntityTags> value) {
1216      return BasicEntityTagsHeader.of(name, value);
1217   }
1218
1219   /**
1220    * Creates a new {@link ETag} header.
1221    *
1222    * @param value
1223    *    The header value.
1224    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1225    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1226    */
1227   public static final ETag eTag(EntityTag value) {
1228      return ETag.of(value);
1229   }
1230
1231   /**
1232    * Creates a new {@link ETag} header.
1233    *
1234    * @param value
1235    *    The header value.
1236    *    <br>Must be an entity tag value (e.g. <js>"\"xyzzy\""</js>).
1237    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1238    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1239    */
1240   public static final ETag eTag(String value) {
1241      return ETag.of(value);
1242   }
1243
1244   /**
1245    * Creates a new {@link ETag} header with a delayed value.
1246    *
1247    * <p>
1248    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
1249    *
1250    * @param value
1251    *    The supplier of the header value.
1252    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1253    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1254    */
1255   public static final ETag eTag(Supplier<EntityTag> value) {
1256      return ETag.of(value);
1257   }
1258

1261    *
1262    * @param value
1263    *    The header value.

1265    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1266    */
1267   public static final Expect expect(String value) {
1268      return Expect.of(value);
1269   }
1270
1271   /**
1272    * Creates a new {@link Expect} header with a delayed value.
1273    *
1274    * <p>
1275    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
1276    *
1277    * @param value
1278    *    The supplier of the header value.
1279    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1280    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1281    */
1282   public static final Expect expect(Supplier<String> value) {
1283      return Expect.of(value);
1284   }
1285
1286   /**
1287    * Creates a new {@link Expires} header.
1288    *
1289    * @param value
1290    *    The header value.
1291    *    <br>Must be an RFC-1123 formated string (e.g. <js>"Sat, 29 Oct 1994 19:43:31 GMT"</js>).
1292    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1293    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1294    */
1295   public static final Expires expires(String value) {
1296      return Expires.of(value);
1297   }
1298
1299   /**
1300    * Creates a new {@link Expires} header with a delayed value.
1301    *
1302    * <p>
1303    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
1304    *
1305    * @param value
1306    *    The supplier of the header value.

1308    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1309    */
1310   public static final Expires expires(Supplier<ZonedDateTime> value) {
1311      return Expires.of(value);
1312   }
1313
1314   /**
1315    * Creates a new {@link Expires} header.
1316    *
1317    * @param value
1318    *    The header value.

1321    */
1322   public static final Expires expires(ZonedDateTime value) {
1323      return Expires.of(value);
1324   }

1341    * <p>
1342    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.

1349   public static final Forwarded forwarded(Supplier<String> value) {

1351   }

1353   /**
1354    * Creates a new {@link From} header.
1355    *
1356    * @param value
1357    *    The header value.

1360    */
1361   public static final From from(String value) {
1362      return From.of(value);
1363   }
1364
1365   /**
1366    * Creates a new {@link From} header with a delayed value.
1367    *
1368    * <p>
1369    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
1370    *
1371    * @param value
1372    *    The supplier of the header value.
1373    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1374    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1375    */
1376   public static final From from(Supplier<String> value) {
1377      return From.of(value);

1379
1380   /**
1381    * Creates a new {@link Header} of the specified type.
1382    *
1383    * <p>
1384    * Same as {@link #header(Class, String, Object)} but the header name is pulled from the {@link org.apache.juneau.http.Header#name() @Header(name)} or
1385    *    {@link org.apache.juneau.http.Header#value() @Header(value)} annotations.
1386    *
1387    * @param <T> The header implementation class.
1388    * @param type The header implementation class.
1389    * @param value The header value.
1390    * @return A new unmodifiable instance, never <jk>null</jk>.
1391    */
1392   public static final <T extends Header> T header(Class<T> type, Object value) {
1393      return HeaderBeanMeta.of(type).construct(null, value);
1394   }
1395
1396   /**
1397    * Creates a new {@link Header} of the specified type.
1398    *
1399    * <p>
1400    * The implementation class must have a public constructor taking in one of the following argument lists:
1401    * <ul>
1402    *    <li><c><jk>public</jk> X(String <jv>headerValue</jv>)</c>
1403    *    <li><c><jk>public</jk> X(Object <jv>headerValue</jv>)</c>
1404    *    <li><c><jk>public</jk> X(String <jv>headerName</jv>, String <jv>headerValue</jv>)</c>
1405    *    <li><c><jk>public</jk> X(String <jv>headerName</jv>, Object <jv>headerValue</jv>)</c>
1406    * </ul>
1407    *
1408    * @param <T> The header implementation class.
1409    * @param type The header implementation class.
1410    * @param name The header name.
1411    * @param value The header value.
1412    * @return A new unmodifiable instance, never <jk>null</jk>.
1413    */
1414   public static final <T extends Header> T header(Class<T> type, String name, Object value) {
1415      return HeaderBeanMeta.of(type).construct(name, value);
1416   }
1417
1418   /**
1419    * Instantiates a new {@link HeaderList}.
1420    *
1421    * @return A new empty builder.
1422    */
1423   public static final HeaderList headerList() {
1424      return HeaderList.create();
1425   }
1426
1427   /**
1428    * Creates a new {@link HeaderList} initialized with the specified headers.
1429    *
1430    * @param headers The headers to add to the list.  <jk>null</jk> entries are ignored.
1431    * @return A new unmodifiable instance, never <jk>null</jk>.
1432    */
1433   public static final HeaderList headerList(Header...headers) {
1434      return HeaderList.of(headers);
1435   }
1436
1437   /**
1438    * Creates a new {@link HeaderList} initialized with the specified headers.
1439    *
1440    * @param headers The headers to add to the list.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.  <jk>null</jk> entries are ignored.
1441    * @return A new unmodifiable instance, never <jk>null</jk>.
1442    */
1443   public static final HeaderList headerList(List<Header> headers) {
1444      return HeaderList.of(headers);
1445   }
1446
1447   /**
1448    * Creates a new {@link HeaderList} initialized with the specified name/value pairs.
1449    *
1450    * @param pairs
1451    *    Initial list of pairs.
1452    *    <br>Must be an even number of parameters representing key/value pairs.
1453    * @throws RuntimeException If odd number of parameters were specified.
1454    * @return A new instance.
1455    */
1456   public static HeaderList headerList(String...pairs) {
1457      return HeaderList.ofPairs(pairs);
1458   }
1459
1460   /**
1461    * Creates a new {@link Host} header.
1462    *
1463    * @param value
1464    *    The header value.
1465    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1466    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1467    */
1468   public static final Host host(String value) {
1469      return Host.of(value);
1470   }
1471
1472   /**
1473    * Creates a new {@link Host} header with a delayed value.
1474    *
1475    * <p>
1476    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
1477    *
1478    * @param value
1479    *    The supplier of the header value.
1480    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1481    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1482    */
1483   public static final Host host(Supplier<String> value) {
1484      return Host.of(value);
1485   }
1486

1489    *
1490    * @param value
1491    *    The header value.

1493    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.

1495   public static final IfMatch ifMatch(EntityTags value) {
1496      return IfMatch.of(value);
1497   }
1498
1499   /**
1500    * Creates a new {@link IfMatch} header.
1501    *
1502    * @param value
1503    *    The header value.
1504    *    <br>Must be a comma-delimited list of entity validator values (e.g. <js>"\"xyzzy\", \"r2d2xxxx\", \"c3piozzzz\""</js>).
1505    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1506    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1507    */
1508   public static final IfMatch ifMatch(String value) {
1509      return IfMatch.of(value);
1510   }
1511
1512   /**
1513    * Creates a new {@link IfMatch} header with a delayed value.
1514    *
1515    * <p>
1516    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
1517    *
1518    * @param value
1519    *    The supplier of the header value.
1520    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1521    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1522    */
1523   public static final IfMatch ifMatch(Supplier<EntityTags> value) {
1524      return IfMatch.of(value);
1525   }

1527   /**

1529    *
1530    * @param value
1531    *    The header value.
1532    *    <br>Must be an RFC-1123 formated string (e.g. <js>"Sat, 29 Oct 1994 19:43:31 GMT"</js>).
1533    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.

1537      return IfModifiedSince.of(value);
1538   }

1552      return IfModifiedSince.of(value);
1553   }

1559    *    The header value.

1567   /**

1571    *    The header value.

1579   /**

1581    *
1582    * @param value
1583    *    The header value.
1584    *    <br>Must be a comma-delimited list of entity validator values (e.g. <js>"\"xyzzy\", \"r2d2xxxx\", \"c3piozzzz\""</js>).
1585    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1586    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1587    */
1588   public static final IfNoneMatch ifNoneMatch(String value) {
1589      return IfNoneMatch.of(value);
1590   }
1591
1592   /**
1593    * Creates a new {@link IfNoneMatch} header with a delayed value.
1594    *
1595    * <p>
1596    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
1597    *
1598    * @param value
1599    *    The supplier of the header value.
1600    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1601    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1602    */
1603   public static final IfNoneMatch ifNoneMatch(Supplier<EntityTags> value) {
1604      return IfNoneMatch.of(value);
1605   }

1607   /**
1608    * Creates a new {@link IfRange} header.
1609    *
1610    * @param value
1611    *    The header value.
1612    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1613    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1614    */
1615   public static final IfRange ifRange(EntityTag value) {
1616      return IfRange.of(value);
1617   }
1618
1619   /**
1620    * Creates a new {@link IfRange} header.
1621    *
1622    * @param value
1623    *    The header value.
1624    *    <br>Must be an RFC-1123 formated string (e.g. <js>"Sat, 29 Oct 1994 19:43:31 GMT"</js>).
1625    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1626    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1627    */
1628   public static final IfRange ifRange(String value) {
1629      return IfRange.of(value);
1630   }
1631
1632   /**
1633    * Creates a new {@link IfRange} header with a delayed value.
1634    *
1635    * <p>
1636    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
1637    *
1638    * @param value
1639    *    The supplier of the header value.
1640    *    <br>Supplier must supply either {@link EntityTag} or {@link ZonedDateTime} objects.
1641    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1642    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1643    */
1644   public static final IfRange ifRange(Supplier<?> value) {
1645      return IfRange.of(value);
1646   }
1647
1648   /**
1649    * Creates a new {@link IfRange} header.
1650    *
1651    * @param value
1652    *    The header value.
1653    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1654    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1655    */
1656   public static final IfRange ifRange(ZonedDateTime value) {
1657      return IfRange.of(value);
1658   }
1659
1660   /**
1661    * Creates a new {@link IfUnmodifiedSince} header.
1662    *
1663    * @param value
1664    *    The header value.
1665    *    <br>Must be an RFC-1123 formated string (e.g. <js>"Sat, 29 Oct 1994 19:43:31 GMT"</js>).
1666    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.

1668    */
1669   public static final IfUnmodifiedSince ifUnmodifiedSince(String value) {
1670      return IfUnmodifiedSince.of(value);
1671   }

1673   /**

1677    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
1678    *
1679    * @param value
1680    *    The supplier of the header value.
1681    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1682    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1683    */
1684   public static final IfUnmodifiedSince ifUnmodifiedSince(Supplier<ZonedDateTime> value) {
1685      return IfUnmodifiedSince.of(value);
1686   }

1688   /**
1689    * Creates a new {@link IfUnmodifiedSince} header.
1690    *
1691    * @param value
1692    *    The header value.

1695    */
1696   public static final IfUnmodifiedSince ifUnmodifiedSince(ZonedDateTime value) {
1697      return IfUnmodifiedSince.of(value);
1698   }

1700   /**
1701    * Creates a new {@link BasicIntegerHeader} header.
1702    *
1703    * @param name The header name.
1704    * @param value
1705    *    The header value.
1706    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1707    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1708    */
1709   public static final BasicIntegerHeader integerHeader(String name, Integer value) {
1710      return BasicIntegerHeader.of(name, value);
1711   }
1712
1713   /**
1714    * Creates a new {@link BasicIntegerHeader} header.
1715    *
1716    * @param name The header name.
1717    * @param value
1718    *    The header value.
1719    *    <br>Must be parsable using {@link Integer#parseInt(String)}.
1720    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1721    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1722    */
1723   public static final BasicIntegerHeader integerHeader(String name, String value) {
1724      return BasicIntegerHeader.of(name, value);
1725   }
1726
1727   /**
1728    * Creates a new {@link BasicIntegerHeader} header with a delayed value.
1729    *
1730    * <p>
1731    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
1732    *
1733    * @param name The header name.
1734    * @param value
1735    *    The supplier of the header value.
1736    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1737    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1738    */
1739   public static final BasicIntegerHeader integerHeader(String name, Supplier<Integer> value) {
1740      return BasicIntegerHeader.of(name, value);
1741   }
1742
1743   /**
1744    * Creates a new {@link LastModified} header.
1745    *
1746    * @param value
1747    *    The header value.
1748    *    <br>Must be an RFC-1123 formated string (e.g. <js>"Sat, 29 Oct 1994 19:43:31 GMT"</js>).
1749    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1750    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1751    */
1752   public static final LastModified lastModified(String value) {
1753      return LastModified.of(value);
1754   }
1755
1756   /**
1757    * Creates a new {@link LastModified} header with a delayed value.
1758    *
1759    * <p>
1760    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
1761    *
1762    * @param value
1763    *    The supplier of the header value.
1764    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1765    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1766    */
1767   public static final LastModified lastModified(Supplier<ZonedDateTime> value) {
1768      return LastModified.of(value);
1769   }
1770
1771   /**
1772    * Creates a new {@link LastModified} header.
1773    *
1774    * @param value
1775    *    The header value.
1776    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1777    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1778    */
1779   public static final LastModified lastModified(ZonedDateTime value) {
1780      return LastModified.of(value);
1781   }
1782
1783   /**
1784    * Creates a new {@link Location} header.
1785    *
1786    * @param value
1787    *    The header value.
1788    *    <br>Must be parsable by {@link URI#create(String)}.
1789    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1790    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1791    */
1792   public static final Location location(String value) {
1793      return Location.of(value);
1794   }
1795
1796   /**
1797    * Creates a new {@link Location} header with a delayed value.
1798    *
1799    * <p>
1800    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
1801    *
1802    * @param value
1803    *    The supplier of the header value.
1804    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1805    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1806    */
1807   public static final Location location(Supplier<URI> value) {
1808      return Location.of(value);
1809   }
1810
1811   /**
1812    * Creates a new {@link Location} header.
1813    *
1814    * @param value
1815    *    The header value.
1816    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1817    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1818    */
1819   public static final Location location(URI value) {
1820      return Location.of(value);
1821   }

1946    */
1947   public static final BasicMediaRangesHeader mediaRangesHeader(String name, Supplier<MediaRanges> value) {
1948      return value == null ? null : new BasicMediaRangesHeader(name, value);
1949   }

2210   /**

2212    *

2214    *    The header value.

2217    */
2218   public static final RetryAfter retryAfter(Integer value) {
2219      return RetryAfter.of(value);
2220   }
2221
2222   /**
2223    * Creates a new {@link RetryAfter} header.
2224    *
2225    * @param value
2226    *    The header value.
2227    *    <br>Must be an RFC-1123 formated string (e.g. <js>"Sat, 29 Oct 1994 19:43:31 GMT"</js>) or an integer.
2228    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
2229    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
2230    */
2231   public static final RetryAfter retryAfter(String value) {
2232      return RetryAfter.of(value);
2233   }
2234
2235   /**
2236    * Creates a new {@link RetryAfter} header with a delayed value.
2237    *
2238    * <p>
2239    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
2240    *
2241    * @param value
2242    *    The supplier of the header value.
2243    *    <br>Supplier must supply either {@link Integer} or {@link ZonedDateTime} objects.
2244    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
2245    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
2246    */
2247   public static final RetryAfter retryAfter(Supplier<?> value) {
2248      return RetryAfter.of(value);
2249   }
2250
2251   /**
2252    * Creates a new {@link RetryAfter} header.
2253    *
2254    * @param value
2255    *    The header value.
2256    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
2257    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
2258    */
2259   public static final RetryAfter retryAfter(ZonedDateTime value) {
2260      return RetryAfter.of(value);
2261   }
2262
2263   /**
2264    * Creates a new {@link SerializedHeader} header.
2265    *
2266    * @param name The header name.
2267    * @param value
2268    *    The POJO to serialize as the header value.
2269    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
2270    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty.
2271    */
2272   public static final SerializedHeader serializedHeader(String name, Object value) {
2273      return SerializedHeader.of(name, value);
2274   }
2275
2276   /**
2277    * Creates a new {@link SerializedHeader} header.
2278    *
2279    * @param name The HTTP header name name.
2280    * @param value
2281    *    The POJO to serialize as the header value.
2282    * @param serializer
2283    *    The serializer to use for serializing the value to a string value.
2284    * @param schema
2285    *    The schema object that defines the format of the output.
2286    *    <br>If <jk>null</jk>, defaults to the schema defined on the serializer.
2287    *    <br>If that's also <jk>null</jk>, defaults to {@link HttpPartSchema#DEFAULT}.
2288    *    <br>Only used if serializer is schema-aware (e.g. {@link OpenApiSerializer}).
2289    *    <br>Can also be a {@link Supplier}.
2290    * @param skipIfEmpty If value is a blank string, the value should return as <jk>null</jk>.
2291    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty.
2292    */
2293   public static SerializedHeader serializedHeader(String name, Object value, HttpPartSerializerSession serializer, HttpPartSchema schema, boolean skipIfEmpty) {
2294      return SerializedHeader.of(name, value, serializer, schema, skipIfEmpty);
2295   }
2296
2297   /**
2298    * Creates a new {@link SerializedHeader} header with a delayed value.
2299    *
2300    * <p>
2301    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
2302    *
2303    * @param name The header name.
2304    * @param value
2305    *    The supplier of the POJO to serialize as the header value.
2306    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
2307    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty.
2308    */
2309   public static final SerializedHeader serializedHeader(String name, Supplier<?> value) {
2310      return SerializedHeader.of(name, value);
2311   }
2312
2313   /**
2314    * Creates a new {@link SerializedHeader} header.
2315    *
2316    * <p>
2317    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
2318    *
2319    * @param name The HTTP header name name.
2320    * @param value
2321    *    The supplier of the POJO to serialize as the header value.
2322    * @param serializer
2323    *    The serializer to use for serializing the value to a string value.
2324    * @param schema
2325    *    The schema object that defines the format of the output.
2326    *    <br>If <jk>null</jk>, defaults to the schema defined on the serializer.
2327    *    <br>If that's also <jk>null</jk>, defaults to {@link HttpPartSchema#DEFAULT}.
2328    *    <br>Only used if serializer is schema-aware (e.g. {@link OpenApiSerializer}).
2329    *    <br>Can also be a {@link Supplier}.
2330    * @param skipIfEmpty If value is a blank string, the value should return as <jk>null</jk>.
2331    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty.
2332    */
2333   public static SerializedHeader serializedHeader(String name, Supplier<?> value, HttpPartSerializerSession serializer, HttpPartSchema schema, boolean skipIfEmpty) {
2334      return SerializedHeader.of(name, value, serializer, schema, skipIfEmpty);
2335   }

2366    *

2368    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value was <jk>null</jk>.
2369    */
2370   public static final BasicStringHeader stringHeader(String pair) {
2371      return BasicStringHeader.ofPair(pair);

2374   /**

2376    *
2377    * @param name The header name.
2378    * @param value
2379    *    The header value.
2380    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
2381    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
2382    */
2383   public static final BasicStringHeader stringHeader(String name, String value) {
2384      return BasicStringHeader.of(name, value);
2385   }

2387   /**
2388    * Creates a new {@link BasicStringHeader} header with a delayed value.
2389    *
2390    * <p>
2391    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
2392    *
2393    * @param name The header name.
2394    * @param value

2398    */
2399   public static final BasicStringHeader stringHeader(String name, Supplier<String> value) {
2400      return BasicStringHeader.of(name, value);
2401   }
